testcase.name: contract actions > a transaction to deploy a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a transaction query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to deploy a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a block query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to deploy a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a contract action query by address
contract actions > a transaction to call a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a transaction query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to call a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a block query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to call a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a contract action query by address
contract actions > a transaction to update a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a transaction query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to update a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a block query by hash
contract actions > a transaction to update a smart contract > should be reported by the indexer through a contract action query by address
shielded transactions > a successful shielded transaction transferring 1 Shielded Token between two wallets > should be reported by the indexer through a block query by hash
shielded transactions > a successful shielded transaction transferring 1 Shielded Token between two wallets > should be reported by the indexer through a transaction query by hash
shielded transactions > a successful shielded transaction transferring 1 Shielded Token between two wallets > should stream Zswap events followed by DustSpendProcessed after a shielded transaction
shielded transactions > a successful shielded transaction transferring 1 Shielded Token between two wallets > should increase the zswap Merkle tree end index
shielded transactions > a successful shielded transaction transferring 1 Shielded Token between two wallets > should increase the dust commitment Merkle tree end index
shielded transactions > a confirmed shielded transfer streamed to wallet sessions by viewing key > should stream the transaction to the source viewing key with a matching hash
shielded transactions > a confirmed shielded transfer streamed to wallet sessions by viewing key > should stream the transaction to the destination viewing key with a matching hash
shielded transactions > a confirmed shielded transfer streamed to wallet sessions by viewing key > should not stream the transaction to an unrelated viewing key
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through a block query by hash
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through a transaction query by hash

unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through an unshielded transaction event for the source address

unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through an unshielded transaction event for the destination address
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should have transferred 1 STAR from the source to the destination address
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through a progress update event for the source address
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should be reported by the indexer through a progress update event for the destination address
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should increase the dust commitment Merkle tree end index
unshielded transactions > a successful unshielded transaction transferring 1 STAR between two addresses > should deliver dust events in correct sequence after unshielded transaction
wallet event subscriptions > empty wallet scenario > should emit only ProgressUpdate for empty wallet
wallet event subscriptions > multi-destination transaction scenario > should emit UnshieldedTransaction only for the target wallet (A > B1)
wallet event subscriptions > multi-destination transaction scenario > should emit UnshieldedTransaction only for the target wallet (A > B2)
wallet event subscriptions > future coverage > should not duplicate events after resubscription
wallet event subscriptions > future coverage > should correctly handle multiple sequential A > B transactions
wallet event subscriptions > future coverage > should correctly handle mixed historical and new wallet subscriptions
wallet event subscriptions > future coverage > should segregate shielded and unshielded events correctly
dust balance query using toolkit > a dust balance query with a valid wallet seed > should respond with a dust balance according to the requested schema
key material derivation validation > a midnight shielded address > should show with the expected prefix for the current network ID
key material derivation validation > a midnight shielded address > should show with the expected prefix for all network IDs
key material derivation validation > a midnight unshielded address > should show with the expected prefix for the current network ID
key material derivation validation > a midnight unshielded address > should show with the expected prefix for all network IDs
key material derivation validation > a midnight viewing key > should show with the expected prefix for the current network ID
key material derivation validation > a midnight viewing key > should show with the expected prefix for all network IDs
show wallet queries using toolkit > private wallet state query using toolkit > should respond with a private wallet state according to the requested schema
show wallet queries using toolkit > public wallet state query using toolkit > should respond with a public wallet state according to the requested schema
